ChatGPT and Grammarly are both popular tools in the AI Writing Tools space. Here's how they compare.

MakerOpenAIGrammarly Inc.
PricingFree plan available; Plus $20/mo; Pro $200/moFree plan available; Premium from $12/mo
Free tierYesYes
Best forGeneral-purpose assistant for writing, brainstorming, coding, and quick research.Everyday proofreading and tone-checking across any app.
